{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143308FABEA05703ABD185A9A8"}"},"total":97},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588936124536029977","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常经典的一本书，值得推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766939074,"group_id":"7489083831866100798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxOHW3GjE1v7xUuute1k/CE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"96685273248","user_name":"心情不错的久贺"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"96685273248","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7489083831866100798","book_info":{"abstract":"【刑侦案件推理】【破案逻辑清晰】【不过度依赖系统】【反派不降质】【案情复杂多次反转】
林准，魂穿成平行世界的一名警校大四学生，无意间被卷入一场连环变态人偶案。
觉醒【凶案现场签到】系统，获得包罗万象的破案神技，从此踏上刑侦破案的警界封神之路。
凶手犯案的缜密残忍，破案剧情的层层推进。人性的善与恶在一起起的凶案现场展现的淋漓尽致。
有追求快感的变态杀人魔，有整容变身的恶毒女凶杀犯，有以恶制恶的高智商罪犯，有借鬼神之说的杀夫可怜妇人……
本书以刑侦破案为主，少量感情戏，刑警生活丰富多彩。
其他警员也都是有血有肉的个体，强迫症晚期的法医高富帅，性格火爆的美少妇刑警，身负血海深仇的缉毒警察，活体显微镜的痕检大爷，温暖贴心的熊妈壮汉……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d0e88f5bf01f2e14d723ec5f9b7df95","author":"苦肠不苦","author_id":"","book_id":"7489083831866100798","book_name":"警校生入职，破案速度让大佬懵了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7489639980881412633","read_count":"46340","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"574505"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"272","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,系统,穿越,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/298217855fcf3e2d3ccee78e51fe72a7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258788&x-signature=OpX8N45ilaYHh%2Fm%2BmObE6iJaObg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1068347082156012","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143308FABEA05703ABD185A9A8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},
